<!--
Tip: the fastest way to file this is straight from the extension — open the
Very Good AdBlock popup and click "Saw an ad slip through?". It pre-fills every
diagnostic below and copies a screenshot of the page to your clipboard so you
can paste it here.
-->

**What ad did you see, and where on the page?**
<!-- e.g. a video pre-roll on YouTube, a banner across the top, a pop-up window -->


**Does it still show after reloading the page?**
<!-- Yes / No -->


**Anything else worth knowing?** (optional)
